name: Runway Characters API
summary: real-time video agents with face + voice in the API — generate HD video in ~100ms, Builders Fund with 500K free API credits for early-stage projects

name: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live
summary: real-time voice model in the developer API — build conversational voice apps with low latency, successor to Gemini 2.5 Flash Native Audio

name: Mistral Speech
summary: open-source text-to-speech model for building voice agents — Apache 2.0, competes with ElevenLabs at zero licensing cost

name: Claude Code Auto Mode
summary: Claude Code now pauses less for approval — ships tasks faster end-to-end while keeping guardrails, new statusline and plugin controls

name: Claude Computer Use (Mac)
summary: Claude can now control your Mac — clicks, types, opens apps — to complete multi-step tasks hands-free, available to Pro/Max subscribers today

name: GPT Image 1.5 API
summary: image editing and generation in the API at $0.009/image — 4x faster than v1, strong image preservation for in-app editing flows

name: Gemini Code Assist (free tier)
summary: Gemini 2.0-powered code assistant now free for individuals — 180,000 completions/month (90x Copilot's free tier), works in VS Code and JetBrains
